name: NICOX SA INH.  EO 1
summary: Nicox S.A. is an international ophthalmology company developing innovative solutions to help maintain vision and improve the health of patients with eye diseases. Headquartered in Sophia Antipolis, France, the company is focused on the research, development, and commercialization of novel ophthalmic therapeutics. Nicox leverages its expertise in nitric oxide donation to develop therapies for glaucoma and other eye disorders.
